name: stackforge
description: Thin core + domain bundles for a fast, stack-aware project start in Claude Code.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Core: subagent-driven process (task-loop), cross-model review (Codex/Gemini), memory, token economy, stack-aware /init.

plugins.name: mobile
plugins.description: Flutter + Riverpod 3: layered/MVVM architecture, tooling guardrails (riverpod_lint, dart analyze/format), testing, security/accessibility, Unity→Flutter migration, store release.

plugins.name: spec-prep
plugins.description: idea → spec: brainstorm, constitution, SPECIFICATION/DESIGN_SPEC/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN with acceptance criteria. Entry point for any domain.

plugins.name: saas
plugins.description: Backend/web: API and contract design, background jobs, multitenancy. Stack knowledge via /init.

plugins.name: ui
plugins.description: Interface design: generative ui-designer agent, visual-craft (numeric rules), drop-in tokens (light+dark, AA), UI architecture, accessibility; generate→audit→review loop with professional tools.

plugins.name: games
plugins.description: Gamedev: GDD and game systems, engine choice (Godot/Unity/Unreal), game-designer agent. Trimmed-down studio hierarchy.

plugins.name: analytics
plugins.description: Analytics/research: fusion generation (Claude+Codex+Gemini), multi-source research, report assembly.

plugins.name: storage
plugins.description: Storage and memory: L3 durable memory (/dream, /warmup, /memory-gc), rolling-log, RAG (pgvector/Qdrant), long-context strategies (index vs RAG vs RLM vs grep).
